title: Robots.txt crawl control
description: Robots.txt should control crawl access without hiding private content or blocking critical resources.
dont: Use robots.txt to hide private content.
Block pages that need Google to see noindex.
Block important resources needed for rendering.

title: Meta robots directives
description: Meta robots should be intentional and visibility-safe.
do: Use max-image-preview:large where image visibility matters.

title: X-Robots-Tag directives
description: Use X-Robots-Tag for file-level and non-HTML indexing control.
dont: Noindex important downloadable assets unless intentional.
